rows.label: qev075301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh! You came at a good time! I was
just about to leave NLA. I'm glad
I could see you before that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask about the destination
of his journey.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for the reason why
he is leaving NLA.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hehe! Are you interested? Well,
you seem like someone who likes
to travel, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm thinking of going to the White
Tree Continent across the sea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heh... If I go that far, even that weird
Bias shouldn't be able to follow me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hm? What do I mean by "weird Bias"?
Man... It's really troublesome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0006
rows.name:
There's this guy who's been following
me around constantly lately, saying
he wants to become my apprentice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's terrible, you know? From morning till night,
he prostrates himself saying "Make me your
apprentice." It's a huge hindrance to my training.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm glad you asked! Lately, I've been
followed around by a weird Bias, and I
haven't been able to train in peace at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0009
rows.name:
...It's terrible, you know? No matter how much I
refuse, from morning till night he prostrates
himself and screams "Make me your apprentice."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0010
rows.name:
I can't concentrate at all. So, I
decided to go on a training journey
all the way to the White Tree Continent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Ah! That's right! Do you
want to come train too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hehe! After all, we are fated
rivals... right? Meeting like
this must also be destiny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I heard there are incredibly strong native
creatures called Hastara Grage there, so we'll
definitely be able to get much stronger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Alright! Now that it's decided,
let's get out of NLA quickly
before that Bias finds us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0015
rows.name:
When we reach the White Tree
Continent, let's race to see who
can defeat a Hastara Grage first![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0016
rows.name:
What do you say? Are you confident
in hunting native creatures?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0031
rows.name: Answer that you are good at hunting.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0041
rows.name: Answer that you are bad at hunting.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0017
rows.name:
I thought so. Your concentration during
combat... is amazing, after all. With that,
you probably wouldn't let any beast escape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0018
rows.name:
...But I won't lose either. I've lived in
the forest since I was little. If wild
beasts are the opponent, I have no equal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Eh... So even you have
things you're bad at.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well, it's true that hunting
wild beasts is completely
different from normal combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Then, do I have the advantage in this match?
I've lived in the forest since I was little. If
wild beasts are the opponent, I have no equal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0022
rows.name: Ah! I found Gi Zang-san! Hey!! Master!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Crap! He's here!
Then I'll go on ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0024
rows.name:
There's a place called Lake
Ciel on the White Tree Continent,
so let's meet up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0025
rows.name: ...[ST:playername], huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0026
rows.name:
*Sigh*... Even though I came
all the way out here, I got
caught by this Bias again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Even though I just want to quickly test
my strength against a Hastara Grage...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Master! In that case, I will accompany
you! Let's defeat something like
that with our combined power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0029
rows.name:
How many times do I have to tell
you, I'm not your master...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0030
rows.name:
You say, "Please, give it up for my
sake"? No matter what you say, I
absolutely cannot take an apprentice...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Why is that!? I really, reaaally! Want
Master to teach me how to fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0032
rows.name: ...Ah, the Earthling from before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey, could you also tell Master
how seriously I came all the way
to the White Tree Continent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0050
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0051
rows.name: Put in a good word for Tolba.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0060
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask why he can't take
him as an apprentice.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Hey, hey... What are you saying now?
I've told you before, haven't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0035
rows.name:
I am a samurai of the Hundred Hellions, an art passed down from
parent to child. I can only take one apprentice in my entire
life... And it has to be someone who will be my successor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0036
rows.name:
I've told you before, haven't I? I am
a samurai of the Hundred Hellions, an
art passed down from parent to child.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0037
rows.name:
I can only take one apprentice in
my entire life... And it has to be
someone who will be my successor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Someone this weak and seemingly gutless... I'd
feel too guilty towards Grandpa, who gave me
this sword, to take him as an apprentice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hey? You know this guy, right? Please,
tell him to give it up already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0070
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0071
rows.name: Tell Tolba to give up.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0080
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask why he wants to become
an apprentice so badly.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0040
rows.name:
There's no way... I can give up. I
never want to feel like that again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0041
rows.name:
...If I tell you, will you be on
my side? Then... I will speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0042
rows.name:
...You see... after I came here...
My mother was killed. By those...
pieces of trash called the Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Even though my mother was murdered right in
front of me, I couldn't even punch them. I was
held down... crying because I was so scared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0044
rows.name:
I... don't want to be weak
anymore! I want to become
strong and protect everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0046
rows.name:
Master! Is it no good!? If you absolutely
say it's no good, then at least show
me how you fight one last time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0047
rows.name:
Then... I'll burn that image into my mind...
And make you my master in my heart! Even alone,
someday I'll become just like you, Master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0048
rows.name: ...Parents killed by the Growth... huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0049
rows.name:
*Sigh*... How should I say this... It's
a story that sounds awfully familiar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0050
rows.name:
...I understand. I'll fight [ST:playername] right
now with enough seriousness so as
not to betray your feelings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Hey, is that okay? I've completely
understood his feelings... I want to
answer them at least a little bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0091
rows.name: Silently take a combat stance.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0101
rows.name: Tell him a battle is not a sideshow.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0052
rows.name:
As expected, you... are a
warrior to the core. Then let's
have our usual serious bout.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0053
rows.name:
...I don't have the slightest intention
of playing out a farce with you either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0054
rows.name:
We will have a serious bout...
pushed to the absolute limit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0055
rows.name:
My name is Gi Zang, the last survivor
of the Hundred Hellions! Now, I draw the
sword entrusted to me by my master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0056
rows.name:
...Hey, Tolba! The battle of a man
carrying the same feelings as you...
Open your eyes and watch carefully!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0076
rows.name: Gah... Hah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0077
rows.name: [ST:playername]...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0078
rows.name:
...How pathetic. I got beaten at
my own game... I... couldn't protect
something precious again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Sorry, I don't think I'll be able to move for
a while... The Hastara Grage is up ahead. To the
beast... that took him... get revenge...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0080
rows.name:
The Hastara Grage is up
ahead... Guh... Ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0081
rows.name: You're back... Did you... do it for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0082
rows.name:
...I see, thank you. With this,
Tolba will find a little peace...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0083
rows.name:
...Damn it! There's no way he can sleep in
peace... Until his mother is avenged, his regrets
and anger won't just vanish because he died![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0084
rows.name:
It's my fault... Because I'm weak...
I failed to protect someone again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0150
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0151
rows.name:
Scold him, telling him
he is exactly right.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0160
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0161
rows.name:
Comfort him, saying it
couldn't be helped.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0085
rows.name:
You really are just like Grandpa. I'm
sure if Grandpa were alive, he would
have scolded me the exact same way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0086
rows.name:
Even though you're so strong,
you're so kind... You really
are a mysterious warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0087
rows.name:
But Grandpa used to say... In
war, there is no such thing as
"it couldn't be helped"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0088
rows.name:
He said we must take responsibility
for the lives of everyone we
are meant to protect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0089
rows.name:
I can't atone for it, but... At
the very least, I will live carrying
the weight of Tolba's life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0090
rows.name:
I will throw everything else away,
train more and more, become stronger...
and kill all the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0170
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0171
rows.name: Agree with Gi Zang's determination.

rows.label: qev075301_JNK0180
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075301_SEL0181
rows.name:
Snap Gi Zang out of being
consumed by hatred.

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0091
rows.name:
Honestly... I'm glad I confided
everything to you alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0092
rows.name:
I'm clumsy, so I can't think of
any other way to console those who
have died other than revenge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0093
rows.name:
Am I... wrong? But right now my
head is boiling and everything's
a mess... I really don't know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0094
rows.name:
Even to understand what you're saying,
I just need to move my body for now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075301_MSG0095
rows.name:
Well, I'm going. Also, this... it's
not much, but please take it.[ST:wait ]
